name: ChkCreate_Timeout, ChkStart_Timeout
title: ChkCreate_Timeout, ChkStart_Timeout
description: The check fires an event if the time has expired.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: > 0; default unit [ms], if not changed with ChkConfig_SetPrecision.

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set.In test modules this parameter is optional.

return: Check was created successfully and may be referenced using the
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
